infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow FH to scan forms with camera.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow FH to pick form images from your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow FH to use microphone for voice input.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow FH to use speech recognition for form help.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow FH to access camera for scanning forms.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow FH to access photos to import forms.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow FH to use microphone for voice input.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow FH to use speech recognition for form help.
